title: Backyard MVP
description: You declared yourself MVP of the backyard league. The league consists of you.

choices.flavor: The acceptance speech is mostly babbling but the confidence is real.

choices.text: Start training for next season immediately
choices.flavor: Run around the yard five times. Fall twice. Get up both times. Season prep complete.

title: The Fastest Player Ever
description: You pretend to be 'the fastest player ever.' You run the same route between the couch and the wall 20+ times.

choices.text: Run faster each time. Beat the record.
choices.flavor: The world record was 4 seconds. Now it is 3.8. The crowd goes wild. The crowd is the cat.
'And he breaks through the defense!' Nobody is playing defense. The imagination is elite.

title: First Trash Talk
description: You tell your older sibling you are better at everything. Evidence is questionable.

choices.text: Double down. List every way you are better.
choices.flavor: 'I am faster, stronger, and I eat more chicken nuggets.' Devastating argument.
You lose the race badly but insist the starting position was unfair.

title: Repetition Machine
description: You found one physical activity you like and now you do it nonstop. Adults are baffled.

choices.text: Jump off the same step 40 times
choices.flavor: The landing technique improves by attempt 30. By attempt 40 it is automatic.

choices.text: Throw the same ball at the same wall forever
choices.flavor: Thud. Thud. Thud. The neighbors are concerned. You are focused.
